• HTML5 web game with canvas rendering and responsive design
  • Client-side game engine with procedural map generation and multiplayer support
  • WebSocket/MQTT-based networking for real-time multiplayer gameplay
  • Mobile-optimized touch controls and desktop keyboard input
  • Save system with IndexedDB and cloud sync capabilities
    class GameEngine { constructor() { this.canvas = $('gameCanvas'); this.ctx = this.canvas.getContext('2d'); } }
    class NetworkManager { connect() { this.client = mqtt.connect(broker, options); } }

This HTML5 game features a client-side game engine with canvas rendering, procedural map generation, and real-time multiplayer support through WebSocket/MQTT networking. The game includes mobile-optimized touch controls, desktop keyboard input, and a comprehensive save system with IndexedDB and cloud sync capabilities.
